scripts.generate:all: pnpm run generate:validators && pnpm run generate:capability-policy
scripts.check:generated-drift: pnpm run generate:all && git -C .. diff --exit-code -- server/src/generated ':(exclude)server/src/generated/version.ts'
scripts.build: node scripts/stamp-version.mjs && pnpm run prisma:generate && tsc -p tsconfig.json
scripts.test: pnpm run lint:main-anchor-config && pnpm run db:prepare && pnpm run prisma:generate && vitest run --pool=forks --poolOptions.forks.singleFork
scripts.test:coverage: pnpm run db:prepare && pnpm run prisma:generate && vitest run --coverage
scripts.db:prepare: rm -f prisma/dev.db prisma/dev.db-shm prisma/dev.db-wal prisma/test.db prisma/test.db-shm prisma/test.db-wal && DATABASE_URL=file:$(pwd)/prisma/dev.db pnpm prisma db push --schema prisma/schema.prisma --skip-generate --force-reset --accept-data-loss && DATABASE_URL=file:$(pwd)/prisma/test.db pnpm prisma db push --schema prisma/schema.prisma --skip-generate --force-reset --accept-data-loss
